stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What is the effect of spoilers on the angle of attack and stall speed at a constant mass?

options.a: With increasing spoilers, the angle of attack increases and the stall speed decreases.
options.b: With decreasing spoilers, the angle of attack decreases and the stall speed increases.
options.c: With increasing spoilers, both the angle of attack and stall speed decrease.
options.d: With increasing spoilers, both the angle of attack and stall speed increase.
